baer_suzuki.production_description: Claude Opus 4.7 + GPT-5.5, human-in-the-loop direction and review. Self-contained: inlines a port of Isaacs, Finite Group Theory Ch. 1-2 (p-core / Fitting subgroup / minimal-normal machinery) under Submission/, since Mathlib has no pCore. Builds on Mathlib rev 5450b53e5ddc; proof routes through Aschbacher §31 (normal closure of x is a p-group)
